title: Investigation And Evaluation Framework
objective: Add a Holmes-style, repo-native investigation and eval layer without making it critical-path runtime.
build_items: Define a repo-native investigation framework inspired by Holmes-style structured investigations and eval loops.
Make incident diagnosis reproducible through scenarios, traces, and benchmark history.
Keep investigation tooling advisory and outside the critical runtime path.
checkpoint_targets: Evaluation suite contract exists and separates deterministic regression from replay-backed reliability runs.
exit_criteria: Serious incidents have reproducible investigation packs.

acceptance_result.verified_by: targeted tests: tests/test_goblin_investigation.py, tests/test_goblin_controls.py, tests/test_goblin_incident.py, tests/test_cli_and_boundaries.py, tests/test_goblin_program.py (40 tests, all passing); AF-CAND-0263 same-window-postpatch investigation pack built

notes: Investigation artifact filenames are compact and deterministic so the workflow remains usable under Windows path-length limits.
